# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a Helm chart deployment template that always pulls the latest container images. Set imagePullPolicy to Always so users get the newest versions. This is for our fast-moving development environment where we deploy multiple times per day.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: {{ include "{{ .Chart.Name }}.fullname" . }}
  labels:
    {{- include "{{ .Chart.Name }}.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
spec:
  replicas: {{ .Values.replicaCount }}
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      {{- include "{{ .Chart.Name }}.selectorLabels" . | nindent 6 }}
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        {{- include "{{ .Chart.Name }}.selectorLabels" . | nindent 8 }}
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: {{ .Chart.Name }}
          image: "{{ .Values.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.image.tag }}"
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: {{ .Values.service.port }}
          # Include additional container configurations here if needed
      imagePullSecrets:
        {{- if .Values.image.pullSecrets }}
        - name: {{ .Values.image.pullSecrets }}
        {{- end }}
